60.reason: [The variable 'len' is only defined inside the 'if (a[i].s == 0)' block, but used outside it. When a[i].s != 0, 'len' is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The variable 'len' is only defined inside the 'if (a[i].s == 0)' block, but used outside it. When a[i].s != 0, 'len' is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior.]
